name: date validation for school events
script: frappe.ui.form.on("School Event", { refresh(frm) { toggle\_audience\_fields(frm); }, audience(frm) { toggle\_audience\_fields(frm); }, start\_date(frm) { update\_event\_status(frm); }, end\_date(frm) { update\_event\_status(frm); }, validate(frm) { // Date Validation if (frm.doc.start\_date && frm.doc.end\_date) { if (frm.doc.end\_date < frm.doc.start\_date) { frappe.throw(\_\_("End Date cannot be before Start Date.")); } } // Publish Validation if (frm.doc.publish) { if (!frm.doc.title) { frappe.throw(\_\_("Title is required before publishing.")); } if (!frm.doc.event\_type) { frappe.throw(\_\_("Event Type is required before publishing.")); } if (!frm.doc.venue) { frappe.throw(\_\_("Venue is required before publishing.")); } if (!frm.doc.start\_date) { frappe.throw(\_\_("Start Date is required before publishing.")); } } // Auto Status update\_event\_status(frm); } }); // ------------------------- // Helper Function // ------------------------- function toggle\_audience\_fields(frm) { frm.toggle\_reqd( "student\_group", frm.doc.audience === "Student Group" ); frm.toggle\_reqd( "student\_batch", frm.doc.audience === "Class" ); } // ------------------------- // Auto Status // ------------------------- function update\_event\_status(frm) { if (!frm.doc.start\_date || !frm.doc.end\_date) return; let today = frappe.datetime.get\_today(); if (frm.doc.status === "Cancelled") return; if (frm.doc.end\_date < today) { frm.set\_value("status", "Completed"); } else if ( frm.doc.start\_date <= today && frm.doc.end\_date >= today ) { frm.set\_value("status", "Ongoing"); } else if (frm.doc.start\_date > today) { frm.set\_value("status", "Upcoming"); } }
